svg.title: VIMBERMAN banner
svg.desc: Retro 90s arcade box art for Vimberman: the pixel-art hero plants a bomb while zombies, a toad, an imp and a teleporting mage close in. Vim motions, bomb fuses, keystroke economy. 19 levels.

g.text: VIM MOTIONS ★ BOMB FUSES ★ KEYSTROKE ECONOMY
19 LEVELS · BUILT BY HERMES AGENT + FABLE 5 · PRS WELCOME
